**Key domain principle to justify the structure** (Cohen, Meisl, Knowles et al., *PNAS 2013 / Nat. Chem. 2018* framework — the canonical Aβ42 model):

- **elongation** (rate ∝ k₊ · m · M) — monomer adds to fibril ends,
